## Summary

Describe the outcome and why it is needed.

## Scope and safety

- [ ] This change is focused and does not include unrelated generated or local files.
- [ ] I checked for personal information, secrets, private URLs, and unapproved claims.
- [ ] I did not add an open-source license or imply rights not granted by the repository.
- [ ] Transaction, analytics, advertising, Cloudflare, Stripe, and Google changes have the required owner approval.

## Validation

- [ ] `npm ci`
- [ ] `npm run check`
- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] `npm run validate`
- [ ] `git diff --check`
- [ ] Relevant desktop, mobile, keyboard, link, schema, and privacy checks

## Evidence and rollback

List screenshots or test evidence, manual verification still needed, and the rollback plan.
